signals.headline: Germany Annual Inflation Confirmed at 2
signals.raw:
Germany Annual Inflation Confirmed at 2.7% for March 2026 | YES | HIGH confidence**  
Germany's annual inflation rate rose to 2.7% in March 2026 from 1.9% in February, confirming preliminary estimates from the Federal Statistical Office; this is the highest since January 2024, driven by energy prices up 7.2%.[1] Core inflation fell slightly to 2.3%, with monthly CPI up 1.1%; forecasts project 3.1%

signals.headline: US Naval Blockade on Iran Implemented | YES | HIGH confidence**
signals.raw:
US Naval Blockade on Iran Implemented | YES | HIGH confidence**

The **United States has commenced a naval blockade of Iran's ports and coastal areas** as of April 14, 2026.[3] President Trump declared that Iranian fast attack ships attempting to approach US vessels will be "immediately eliminated," and Tehran has vowed retaliation in response.[3]

signals.headline: Two-Week Ceasefire in Effect | YES | HIGH confidence**
signals.raw:
Two-Week Ceasefire in Effect | YES | HIGH confidence**

A **fragile two-week ceasefire entered its second day** as of April 9, 2026, following overnight negotiations.[1] Prime Minister Netanyahu publicly backed the ceasefire and committed to halting Israeli airstrikes on Iran, though he characterized it as a "temporary suspension of fighting."[1]
